purpose: Top-level layout stylesheet for the IDE / Code Explorer view. Defines .ide-view (root flex column container, full width/height, var(--bg)) and the .workspace-tabs bar (36px high, horizontal-scrolling tabs hidden scrollbar, .workspace-tab elements with .active state, close buttons, dirty indicators). Acts as the structural skeleton hosting child IDE panels (file explorer, editor, search, debug panels) styled by sibling ide-*.css files.
gotchas: Root class .ide-view is generic and could collide if another feature ever uses 'ide' nomenclature. Treat as namespace.
Workspace tabs use scrollbar-width:none + ::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none} — horizontal overflow is invisible to the user.
Loaded by main.jsx globally AND by IDEView.jsx — two import paths, but Vite dedupes.
patterns: Structural container pattern: 100% width/height flex column, overflow:hidden to clip children.
Fixed-height bars (36px) with min-height + height + flex-shrink:0 lock zones.
conventions: Class prefix: .ide-view, .workspace-tab-* (this file is the only one defining .workspace-* classes).
